feature: MCP health check: block metadata and link-local addresses by resolving the host
workflow_rationale: Security-focused enhancement to an existing endpoint. Adds proper SSRF protection by validating resolved IP addresses against reserved/link-local ranges. Refactor pattern because we're enhancing existing behavior without breaking it.

phases.name: Implement Hostname Resolution and IP Validation
phases.description: Add a helper function that resolves hostnames to IP addresses and validates they are not in reserved/link-local/multicast/unspecified ranges. Update check_mcp_health to use this helper.

subtasks.description: Add _validate_mcp_server_url helper function to validate URLs for SSRF protection

verification.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'apps/web-server'); from server.routes.git import _validate_mcp_server_url; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Helper should resolve hostname and check each address against is_loopback (allow first), is_private (allow), is_reserved/link_local/multicast/unspecified (reject). Use ipaddress module (stdlib). Return (is_valid: bool, reason: str).

subtasks.description: Update check_mcp_health to use the new _validate_mcp_server_url helper

verification.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'apps/web-server'); from server.routes.git import check_mcp_health; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Update check_mcp_health (line 768) to call _validate_mcp_server_url before attempting to connect. Keep existing response shape: {success: True, data: {serverId, status: 'unknown', message}}. Log rejection reason, don't return it.

phases.name: Add and Run Tests
phases.description: Add comprehensive tests covering all acceptance criteria including reserved ranges, link-local addresses, loopback, private ranges, unresolvable hosts, and file:// scheme.

subtasks.description: Create test file for MCP health check endpoint with comprehensive coverage
subtasks.notes: ✓ Created 48 comprehensive tests covering all 6 acceptance criteria. All tests passing. Tests cover: AC#1 (169.254.169.254 blocked), AC#2 (localhost/127.0.0.1/::1 allowed), AC#3 (10.x/172.16/12/192.168 private ranges allowed), AC#4 (invalid URLs rejected), AC#5 (response shape preserved with status='unknown'), AC#6 (file:// scheme blocked, public hosts handled). Commit: a3849d5

phases.name: Verification and Integration
phases.description: Verify all existing tests still pass and no regressions are introduced.

subtasks.description: Run full test suite to ensure no regressions in related routes

verification.command: cd apps/web-server && pytest tests/ -k 'mcp or ollama or git' -v

subtasks.notes: ✓ Regression testing completed. All 58 tests passed (48 MCP health check + 6 clone security + 4 project repo tests). No regressions detected in related routes. Changes are localized to _validate_mcp_server_url helper and its usage in check_mcp_health.

acceptance_criteria: All 6 acceptance criteria from spec are verified by tests
Helper function correctly resolves hostnames and validates IP ranges
Response shape preserved for rejected URLs
Rejection reason is logged, not returned

verification_steps.name: Regression Tests
verification_steps.command: cd apps/web-server && pytest tests/ -k 'mcp or ollama' -v

verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk because this is a security fix that affects URL validation. Must ensure all address ranges are correctly handled, loopback order is correct, and response shape is preserved.
